## Generated Files Verification

Checked 5 file(s) by running `pwsh ./utils/generate.ps1` independently.

**Mismatches:**
- `binding/SkiaSharp/SkiaApi.generated.cs`: PR has sk_surface_draw_with_sampling (removed by regeneration); regeneration adds sk_typeface_create_default and other new functions. 133 lines differ. Indicates C API headers in PR don't match latest generator output.
- `binding/SkiaSharp.Resources/ResourcesApi.generated.cs`: PR has skresources_data_uri_resource_provider_proxy_make2, skresources_file_resource_provider_make2, and ImageDecodeStrategy enum (52 lines differ). These use the new skresources_image_decode_strategy_t type. Regeneration does not produce these — C header may be incomplete.
- `binding/HarfBuzzSharp/HarfBuzzApi.generated.cs`: PR version has hb_draw_funcs_t and hb_paint_funcs_t using directives; regeneration produces different output with 2912 lines of diff. Likely different harfbuzz header version between PR and regenerated.

**⚠️ Unexpected changes** (33):
- `include/core/SkFont.h` — Fork patch: adds default typeface factory for C API compatibility after upstream removed SkTypeface::MakeDefault

- `include/core/SkTextBlob.h` — Fork patch: exposes text blob builder helpers for C API
